name: Gilda Radner
blurb: A beloved original SNL cast member and character comedian.
bio: Gilda Radner (1946-1989) was an American comedian and one of the original 1975 Saturday Night Live cast members, creating indelible characters such as Roseanne Roseannadanna and Emily Litella. She won a Primetime Emmy for her SNL work.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
